why_this_action.summary: Owned-content lane stayed selected, but no fresh repo-native guide remained unpublished for Telegraph. Scheduled an automatic post-hold marketer rerun at the updated short-window release time.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
outreach-log.md: avoid duplicate submission work and repeated HN/Lobsters-only handoff
market_intelligence_latest.json: reusable competitor comparisons and positioning truths

blocking_factors: No unpublished owned-content guide was available for Telegraph publication.
